case_title: MICAL NEILL VS. LITHIA MOTOR'S INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [HEARING:MAY-25-23 @ 3:30PM] SERVED APR-13-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DCH OXNARD 1521 IMPORTS INC.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MR. JEFFREY HALL, PRODUCT SPECIALIST / ASST. OPERATIONS MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT LITHIA MOTOR'S INC. DCH OXNARD 1521 IMPORTS INC.
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NEILL, MICAL AS TO DEFENDANT LITHIA MOTOR'S INC. DCH OXNARD 1521 IMPORTS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEILL, MICAL AS TO DEFENDANT LITHIA MOTOR'S INC.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-10-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MICAL MEILL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LITHIA MOTOR'S INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JEFFREY HALL, PRODUCT SPECIALIST / ASST. OPERATIONS MANAGER.. DEFENDANT DCH OXNARD 1521 IMPORTS INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JEFFREY HALL, PRODUCT SPECIALIST / ASST. OPERATIONS MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICE ISSUES WITH SERVICE ON DCH OXNARD 1521 IMPORTS INC.PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $8636.53 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JULY 10, 2023, HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE AND AT WHICH TIME A JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED FOR THE SAME AMOUNT. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALL THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEFFREY HALL FOR LITHIA MOTOR'S INC AND DCH OXNARD 1521 IMPORTS INC FILED BY NEILL, MICAL LITHIA MOTOR'S INC. DCH OXNARD 1521 IMPORTS INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEILL, MICAL AS TO DEFENDANT DCH OXNARD 1521 IMPORTS INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PLEASE SEE SIGNATURE BOX. SERVED APR-19-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LITHIA MOTOR'S INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: HARRY L. JACOBS; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
